expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md the run explicitly states the focus is not demonstrated as explicitly covered: "Case focus explicitly covered: Not demonstrated / insufficient evidence" and notes the rubric "does not explicitly enumerate the benchmark focus items" and that no Phase 5b run artifacts (checkpoint audit/delta) were provided to show the focus items were captured.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md explicitly scope to Phase 5b and enumerate Phase 5b required artifacts and gates. execution_notes.md: "Primary phase under test: phase5b". result.md: "Phase 5b shipment checkpoint" and lists required Phase 5b outputs (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b) and validations/disposition routing.
